events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario. The user gave context: commercial project, concrete/masonry, form build & bracing, rough-complete. Scenario says progress photos show current checkpoint scope finished for this area. Remaining visible work is cleanup, labeling, or follow-on finish work outside checkpoint being scored. Reference ACI 347. No specific defects described. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since no defects flagged, component conditions none. Work stage rough-complete. Percent complete maybe 95? Value 0. Need include references ACI 347. Risk low. Findings empty? Could include no significant findings. Actions maybe none or continue to closeout. Need valid JSON. Since task asks evaluate described field condition. There are no photos actually, but scenario says photos show scope finished, remaining cleanup. So pass. Need ensure no prose outside JSON.
